chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-760 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 14-05-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Brohi, Advocate for petitioner. Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for respondents. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that the petitioner would avail alternate remedy by approaching the proper forum for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
